warnings: Second of 2 views on this page; sibling is the plan view _view1_wc3_plan.json.

Shower-zone floor level printed as '+0.48' in this section, sharply different from the '+3.63'/'+3.65' levels used for the same zones on the plan view (view1) and on WC.1/WC.2's equivalent levels -- could be a genuine different reference datum for this particular sheet's section, or a transcription/OCR issue (e.g. missing leading '3'); recorded exactly as printed and flagged for human review rather than corrected to match the plan.
